design_strategy.context: Brand Story Video Modal for Mobile/iPhone
design_strategy.primary_goal: Fix 'too big' video cropping on mobile while maintaining cinematic feel

modal_container.changes: Remove padding-based safe-areas from the root container. The video background must bleed to the edges (behind the notch/home indicator).

video_element.issue: Currently uses object-fit: cover which zooms in heavily on landscape videos when viewed on portrait phones.
video_element.solution: Use responsive object-fit. 'contain' for portrait mobile (to show full width) and 'cover' for desktop/landscape.
video_element.classes: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-contain md:object-cover

safe_areas.description: Controls and text must respect device safe areas (notch, home bar)
safe_areas.implementation: Apply padding-top/bottom: env(safe-area-inset-*) explicitly to the CONTROLS wrapper, not the video wrapper.
safe_areas.instruction: Wrap close button and bottom controls in safe-area-aware containers.

components.name: BrandStoryModal
instructions: 1. Remove inline style padding from the outer motion.div (lines 267-272). Let it fill the screen.
2. Update <video> className: Change 'object-cover' to 'object-contain md:object-cover' to prevent mobile zooming.
3. Update <video> inline styles: Remove 'objectFit: cover' from inline styles to let CSS classes handle it.
4. Update Close Button: Add 'top-4 sm:top-6 pt-[env(safe-area-inset-top)]' to ensure it clears the notch.
5. Update Bottom Controls: Add 'pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)]' to the bottom control container.
6. Mobile Optimization: Ensure text overlays (title/subtitle) are positioned with 'bottom-24' or similar to clear the specific mobile controls layout.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients on the video element itself.
Ensure 'Close' button is at least 44x44px touch target on mobile.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
